reference: IT'S AN UNPLEASANT THING TO HAVE TO SAY HE BLURTED OUT PRESENTLY BUT I'M AFRAID YOU MUST HAVE A THIEF AMONG YOUR SERVANTS SOMETHING'S BEEN TAKEN OUT OF MY PORTMANTEAU
text: It's an unpleasant thing to have to say," he blurted out. Presently, but I'm afraid you must have a thief among your servants. Something's been taken out of my portmanteau.
